title: glossocardia orthochaeta
intro: Glossocardia orthochaeta, also known as the Cape Marshmallow or Cape-Harebell, is a plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Glossocardia orthochaeta is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
